accurate.why: Matches the two amendments to the Lake Tahoe Restoration Act.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabrications; PL 106-506 context is correct.

states_purpose.why: States it reauthorizes/extends the Lake Tahoe Restoration Act.

effective_dates.why: Notes the new September 30, 2034 availability date and Oct 1, 2024 enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers both amendments and the new 2034 deadline.

correct_entities.why: Lake Tahoe Restoration Act / PL 106-506 correct.

correct_figures.why: September 30, 2034 and the 2016 WRDA reference are correct.
